error_signature: Activation Key has already been used on this instance
title: License activation key already used
symptom: When attempting to upload the license key for a self-hosted n8n instance, the error 'Activation Key has already been used on this instance' appears.
not_this_if: License key is valid and not previously used
root_cause: This error occurs when the n8n instance has already been registered with the provided license key. If the instance is registered, the system prevents reactivation with the same key to avoid misuse.
fix_steps: Check the registration status in Settings → Usage and Plan.
If it shows [Registered], run the command: `docker exec -u node -it [n8n-container-name] n8n license:clear`.
Re-enter the license key after the container has booted up.
agent_instruction: Clear the existing license and restart the n8n container before re-entering the license key.
